summaryNotes: Each summary dimension is independent and reconciles to 105 keys on its own.
Do not add counts across independent dimensions.
Only scopeClassification is intended as an implementation partition.
Previous stale reporting misclassified pass_pick6 and pass_int_td as backlog even though the derived-stat pipeline and scoring merge path already supported them.

h4Backlog.title: Group A — derivable from existing weekly data
h4Backlog.description: Keys that can be computed from already-extracted weekly player stats without adding a new upstream source.

h4Backlog.title: Group B — source available but unwired
h4Backlog.description: Keys whose raw columns already exist in the nflverse weekly player stats artifact but are not yet normalized into canonical stats.

h4Backlog.title: Group A/B candidates blocked after verification
h4Backlog.description: Keys reviewed in the same quick-win tranche that could not be safely activated because the archived weekly source did not verify the needed field.

keys.label: Return first downs
keys.recommendedPath: Keep blocked until a verified source field exists.
blockers: Archived nflverse weekly player stats do not expose a verified return-first-down column; return_fd cannot be activated from the current weekly source.

h4Backlog.title: Group C — additional PBP derivations
h4Backlog.description: Keys that still require more play-by-play-derived canonical stats beyond the H2/H2.1 set now in production.

keys.label: Offensive fumble recovery
keys.recommendedPath: Extend the PBP derivation pipeline with a new derived canonical stat.

keys.label: Passing TD of 40+ yards bonus
keys.recommendedPath: Extend the PBP derivation pipeline with a new derived canonical stat.

keys.recommendedPath: Extend the PBP derivation pipeline with a new derived canonical stat.

keys.label: Offensive fumble recovery touchdown
keys.recommendedPath: Extend the PBP derivation pipeline with a new derived canonical stat.

h4Backlog.title: Group D — team-context dependent
h4Backlog.description: Keys that depend on team-level game results rather than player stat rows or player-level PBP accumulation.

keys.label: Points allowed: shutout (0)
keys.recommendedPath: Add a team game-result ingestion layer and team-defense aggregation.
blockers: Requires team-level game aggregate (points allowed per game), not per-player stats

implementationRoadmap.label: Offensive fumble recovery
implementationRoadmap.notes: Engine rule implemented; H9.4 offensive projection uses an explicit known-zero/non-repeatable policy unless a future PBP recovery projection model is added.

implementationRoadmap.label: Passing TD of 40+ yards bonus
implementationRoadmap.notes: Engine rule implemented; projection uses bounded long-TD approximation because direct passer long-TD weekly component is not currently present.

implementationRoadmap.label: Passing TD of 50+ yards bonus
implementationRoadmap.notes: 50p is a subset of 40p; projection uses a more conservative bounded approximation.

implementationRoadmap.label: Passing completion of 40+ yards bonus
implementationRoadmap.notes: Engine rule implemented; projection uses bounded proxy from sparse long-play evidence.

implementationRoadmap.label: Reception of 40+ yards bonus
implementationRoadmap.notes: Engine rule implemented; projection uses bounded proxy from sparse long-play receiving evidence.

implementationRoadmap.label: Rush of 40+ yards bonus
implementationRoadmap.notes: Engine rule implemented; projection uses bounded proxy from sparse long-play rushing evidence.

implementationRoadmap.label: Offensive fumble recovery touchdown
implementationRoadmap.notes: Engine rule implemented; H9.4 offensive projection treats this as a non-repeatable known-zero event unless a future recovery-TD model is added.

implementationRoadmap.label: Points allowed: shutout (0)
blockers: Requires team-level game aggregate (points allowed per game), not per-player stats
implementationRoadmap.notes: pts_allow is a team-level stat; needs a separate team game-result ingestion pipeline.

implementationRoadmap.label: Yards allowed: 0-100
implementationRoadmap.notes: yds_allow is a team-level stat; needs team game-result ingestion pipeline.

implementationRoadmap.label: Return first downs
blockers: Archived nflverse weekly player stats do not expose a verified return-first-down column; return_fd cannot be activated from the current weekly source.
implementationRoadmap.notes: H4A investigated this key explicitly and left it non-operational rather than inferring it from unrelated fields.

registry.label: Passing incompletions
registry.notes: Derived during weekly normalization as pass_att - pass_cmp with a persisted warning when source completions exceed attempts.

registry.label: Pick-sixes thrown
registry.notes: Derived from nflverse PBP; stored in player_weekly_derived_stats and merged onto weekly scoring rows.

registry.label: Pick-six thrown (alternate key)
registry.notes: Alias for pass_pick6. Both keys evaluate identically once the derived pass_pick6 canonical stat is present.

registry.label: TE reception bonus (legacy key)
registry.notes: Legacy Sleeper key; bonus_rec_te is the preferred modern key. Both resolve to the same rec stat for TE.

registry.label: RB reception bonus (legacy key)
registry.notes: Legacy Sleeper key; bonus_rec_rb is the preferred modern key.

registry.label: WR reception bonus (legacy key)
registry.notes: Legacy Sleeper key; bonus_rec_wr is the preferred modern key.

registry.label: Total fumbles (lost + recovered)
registry.notes: Different from fum_lost: counts all fumbles regardless of recovery. Columns exist in nflverse weekly CSV.

registry.label: Fumble return touchdowns
registry.notes: Derived from nflverse PBP only when the recovery player and touchdown scorer match unambiguously in structured fields.

registry.label: Offensive fumble recovery
registry.notes: Engine rule implemented; H9.4 offensive projection uses an explicit known-zero/non-repeatable policy unless a future PBP recovery projection model is added.

registry.label: Kick return yards
registry.notes: Return stats exist in nflverse weekly CSV for all players including offensive skill positions.

registry.label: Return touchdowns (kick or punt)
registry.notes: nflverse weekly exposes a single player-level special_teams_tds total rather than separate kick and punt return touchdown columns.

registry.label: Return first downs
blockers: Archived nflverse weekly player stats do not expose a verified return-first-down column; return_fd cannot be activated from the current weekly source.
registry.notes: H4A investigated this key explicitly and left it non-operational rather than inferring it from unrelated fields.

registry.label: QB first-down bonus (per passing first down)
registry.notes: Additive to pass_fd; reads same pass_fd stat but under a different scoring key.

registry.label: RB first-down bonus (per rushing + receiving first down)
WR first-down bonus (per receiving first down)
TE first-down bonus (per receiving first down)
Receiving TD of 40+ yards bonus
registry.notes: Derived from nflverse PBP; stored in player_weekly_derived_stats with stat_scope=nflverse_pbp_derived.

registry.label: Receiving TD of 50+ yards bonus
registry.notes: 50p is a subset of 40p; leagues use either the lower threshold or both additively.

registry.label: Passing TD of 40+ yards bonus
registry.notes: Engine rule implemented; projection uses bounded long-TD approximation because direct passer long-TD weekly component is not currently present.

registry.label: Passing TD of 50+ yards bonus
registry.notes: 50p is a subset of 40p; projection uses a more conservative bounded approximation.

registry.label: Passing completion of 40+ yards bonus
registry.notes: Engine rule implemented; projection uses bounded proxy from sparse long-play evidence.

registry.label: Reception of 20-29 yards bonus
registry.notes: Projection estimates expected weekly hit counts from role-week receiving-yard distribution.

registry.label: Reception of 30-39 yards bonus
registry.notes: Projection estimates expected weekly hit counts from role-week receiving-yard distribution.

registry.label: Reception of 40+ yards bonus
registry.notes: Engine rule implemented; projection uses bounded proxy from sparse long-play receiving evidence.

registry.label: Rush of 40+ yards bonus
registry.notes: Engine rule implemented; projection uses bounded proxy from sparse long-play rushing evidence.

registry.label: Extra points made
blockers: K position excluded from current nflverse weekly ingestion scope
registry.notes: nflverse weekly has kicker stats; data pipeline scope must be extended to K.

registry.label: Field goals made
registry.notes: Overlapping-FG rule: deactivated when distance-band keys are also active to avoid double-counting.

registry.label: FG made 50+ yards
registry.notes: Overlaps fgm_50_59 and fgm_60p; Sleeper leagues use one or the other.

registry.label: Sacks
blockers: DEF and IDP positions excluded from current ingestion scope
registry.notes: Rule handles both DEF and IDP positions with the same key; Sleeper registers one entry per position group.

registry.label: Interceptions
registry.notes: Same dual-position key as sack.

registry.label: Special-teams forced fumble
blockers: DEF and IDP positions excluded from current ingestion scope
registry.notes: Forced fumble credited to a kicking/coverage-unit player; separate from field-player ff. No engine rule implemented.

registry.label: Special-teams fumble recovery
registry.notes: Fumble recovery credited to a kicking/coverage-unit player; no engine rule implemented.

registry.label: Offensive fumble recovery touchdown
registry.notes: Engine rule implemented; H9.4 offensive projection treats this as a non-repeatable known-zero event unless a future recovery-TD model is added.

registry.label: Fourth-down stops
registry.notes: Requires play-by-play or team game-log data; not in standard player_stats CSV.

registry.label: Three-and-outs forced
registry.notes: Requires drive-level team data; not derivable from player stats.

registry.label: Points allowed: shutout (0)
blockers: Requires team-level game aggregate (points allowed per game), not per-player stats
registry.notes: pts_allow is a team-level stat; needs a separate team game-result ingestion pipeline.

registry.label: Yards allowed: 0-100
registry.notes: yds_allow is a team-level stat; needs team game-result ingestion pipeline.

registry.label: Solo tackles
blockers: IDP position group excluded from current nflverse weekly ingestion scope
registry.notes: nflverse has defensive player stats via a separate endpoint/CSV; not yet wired.

registry.label: Defensive fumble-return TD 50+ yards bonus
blockers: DEF and IDP positions excluded from current ingestion scope
registry.notes: Bonus for a defensive fumble return touchdown of 50+ yards; no engine rule implemented.

registry.label: Defensive INT-return TD 50+ yards bonus
registry.notes: Bonus for an interception return touchdown of 50+ yards; no engine rule implemented.

registry.label: 2+ sack game bonus (IDP)
registry.notes: Projection mode uses an explicit low-confidence season approximation emitted by H9.10.
